The '''Technical Services Division''', also known simply as '''Technical Services''', was a subdivision of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy's]] [[Fleet Support Branch]]. It was charged with all matters relating to power distribution, environment, and other services not covered by the [[Engineering Division]].<ref name="ISB" />
